content.text:
Sender (untrusted metadata):
```json
{
  "label": "openclaw-control-ui",
  "id": "openclaw-control-ui"
}
```

[Mon 2026-03-16 07:42 UTC] redonne moi le Télégram de Max
Je vais chercher dans Notion d'abord, comme la règle l'exige.

arguments.command: curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /home/gilles/.openclaw/credentials/notion)" -H "Notion-Version: 2022-06-28" "https://api.notion.com/v1/databases/304ddac9-bdfc-81ea-addc-df57ab970a43/query" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"filter":{"property":"Nom","title":{"contains":"Max"}}}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -m json.tool 2>/dev/null | head -100

curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $(cat /home/gilles/.openclaw/credentials/notion)" -H "Notion-Version: 2022-06-28" "https://api.notion.com/v1/databases/304ddac9-bdfc-81ea-addc-df57ab970a43/query" -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"filter":{"property":"Nom","title":{"contains":"Max"}}}' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
for r in data.get('results', []):
    props = r.get('properties', {})
    # Nom
    nom = ''
    for t in props.get('Nom', {}).get('title', []):
        nom += t.get('plain_text', '')
    # Telegram
    telegram = props.get('Telegram', {})
    phone = props.get('Téléphone', props.get('Phone', {}))
    print(f'Nom: {nom}')
    for k, v in props.items():
        if 'telegram' in k.lower() or 'phone' in k.lower() or 'tel' in k.lower() or 'contact' in k.lower():
            print(f'  {k}: {v}')
    print('--- ALL PROPS ---')
    for k, v in props.items():
        print(f'  {k}: {v.get(\"type\", \"?\")}')
"
